content.speakerText: Hi there! How can I help you today?
content.speakerTextCn: 您好！今天有什么可以帮您的？
expectedAnswers: I'd like to open a savings account.
I want to open a checking account, please.
I'm here to open a new bank account.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了开户意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合银行服务场景的礼貌语境
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'open an account' 或类似核心表达

content.speakerText: Sure thing! Do you have your ID and proof of address?
content.speakerTextCn: 当然！您有身份证和住址证明吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, here's my passport and a recent utility bill.
Yep, I've got both with me.
I forgot the bill, but I have my lease agreement — would that work?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了是否携带证件
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'here's' 或 'I've got' 表达即时出示
表达自然度：语气是否自然、符合口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'ID', 'proof of address', 'passport', 'bill' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Good afternoon. How may I assist you today?
content.speakerTextCn: 下午好。今天有什么可以帮您的吗？
expectedAnswers: I'd like to close my old account and open a new one.
I need to deposit some cash and update my contact info.
Could you help me set up online banking, please?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明了具体需求
语言准确性：语法和动词搭配是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了礼貌句型如 'I'd like' 或 'Could you help me'
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'open account', 'deposit', 'update info', 'online banking' 等银行场景词汇
